evals.name: 的/得/地及CJK-Latin混排测试
evals.expected_output: 触发后先问中西文混排规范，确认后全自动执行：去口癖→的/得/地→术语→混排空格→标点去除→游戏书名号→置信度评分+diff对比表

assertions.name: typesetting_question_asked
assertions.text: 技能触发后先询问中西文混排规范
assertions.check: output before processing contains '中西文混排' or '是否需要调整'

assertions.name: filler_removed
assertions.text: 去除 嗯/啊 口癖词
assertions.check: output enhanced text does NOT contain '嗯' or '啊' as standalone hesitation sounds

assertions.name: de_ge_de_corrected_1
assertions.text: 的/得/地：做的非常好→做得非常好
assertions.check: output enhanced text contains '做得非常好'

assertions.name: de_ge_de_corrected_2
assertions.text: 的/得/地：做的不错→做得不错
assertions.check: output enhanced text contains '做得不错'

assertions.name: de_ge_de_corrected_3
assertions.text: 的/得/地：跑的很快→跑得很快
assertions.check: output enhanced text contains '跑得很快'

assertions.name: cjk_latin_spacing
assertions.check: output enhanced text contains 'Python 3.9'

assertions.name: digit_han_spacing
assertions.check: output enhanced text contains '他 3'

assertions.name: unit_compact
assertions.check: output enhanced text contains '5GB' not '5 G'

assertions.name: timestamps_preserved
assertions.check: output enhanced text contains all original timestamps

assertions.name: diff_output_present
assertions.check: output contains '原文' and '修改后' in a table

assertions.name: confidence_scores
assertions.check: output contains confidence indicators: '高' or '低' or '%'
